description: Installs Jenkins LTS via Chocolatey, ensures Java prerequisite, and verifies the Jenkins service.

messages.jenkinsNotFound: Jenkins not found, installing via Chocolatey...
messages.javaMissing: Java not found. Jenkins requires Java {minVersion}+. Run script 40 (install-java) first.
messages.javaTooOld: Java version too old: {version}. Jenkins requires Java {minVersion}+.
messages.serviceRunning: Jenkins service is running on port {port}.
messages.serviceStopped: Jenkins service is installed but not running. Starting...
messages.serviceStartFailed: Failed to start Jenkins service. Start manually with: Start-Service Jenkins
messages.serviceMissing: Jenkins service not registered. Reinstall may be required.
messages.initialPasswordMissing: Initial admin password file not found yet at: {path} (service may need to fully start first)
messages.openUrl: Open Jenkins in your browser at: http://localhost:{port}
messages.scriptDisabled: Jenkins installation is disabled in config.
messages.uninstallFailed: Jenkins uninstall failed -- may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Jenkins removed, tracking purged.

commands.all: Install Jenkins + verify Java + verify service + PATH setup (default)
commands.status: Check Jenkins service status and initial admin password
commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
